content.en:
The seventh dimension of the will is peerless, and the research of the Wumu robbery and killing technique was created, and Ye Tian also passed the second test.

Many rewards emerge and he chooses a treasure from among them.

Ye Tian chose for a long time, and finally chose a treasure-Seven-Dimensional Heavenly Fruit.

According to the introduction, this treasure is a special thing that grows in the seventh dimension of a treasure land, and it is conceived by absorbing multi-dimensional energy, and it takes an infinite long time before it can be hopefully born, which can greatly temper the soul will, and the effect is very good.

Ye Tian really wanted to quickly improve his soul will, so he chose it.

Wow!

The Seven-Dimensional Heavenly Fruit fell into his hands.

Then, Ye Tian left here with the Seven-Dimensional Heavenly Fruit and the Will Dimension Gem.

Back to the outside world.

Ye Tian took the Seven-Dimensional Heavenly Fruit and immediately retreated to refine it, using it to strengthen his soul will.

In order to be able to make the most of this seven-dimensional heavenly fruit, Ye Tian used the Rock Will Method, a method for refining the soul will, to absorb and refine the seven-dimensional heavenly fruit.27

Rumble!!!!!

The energy of the Seven-Dimensional Heavenly Fruit continued to refine Ye Tian's soul will, making his soul will continue to increase, becoming more and more tenacious and powerful.

This time, he had refined dozens of extradimensional epochs before he finally refined this seven-dimensional heavenly fruit, and his soul will also skyrocketed.

Subsequently, he used the secret technique of the Thousand Dimensions Technique to test his soul will level.

"It's still in the seventh dimension, but it's very close to the eighth dimension!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It can be said that this seven-dimensional heavenly fruit has already saved him a long time of penance!

"If there is another seventh-dimensional heavenly fruit, I can definitely raise my soul will to the eighth dimension!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

So after a period of time, he once again sent a replica body to the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord to pick wool, and he wanted to obtain another seven-dimensional heavenly fruit.

......

"Something is wrong, how did you create the slightest danger?"

Ye Tian frowned secretly.

There was a hint of vigilance in his heart, but he still honestly walked towards one of the safe extradimensional passages.

He originally thought that this safe passage could enter the land of inheritance, but this safe extra-dimensional passage suddenly changed, from a safe extra-dimensional passage to a killing array.

Bang!!!!

Endless killing opportunities emerged, and a terrifying force locked onto him.

"Little one, just in moderation, it's too much to come again and again. There are a lot of treasures left behind by the Lord of the Wumu Realm, if you take too much, this inheritance place will be wasted!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian's face changed.

Sure enough, he was still discovered.

"Seniors are ......"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's just a multi-dimensional intelligent life created by the Lord of the Wumu Realm!"

Wow!

A phantom appeared, only showing the phantom, and its terrifying aura shocked Ye Tian.

"My body is not here, it's just a wisp of clone guarding here, guarding this place of inheritance. In a short period of time, many of the treasures here were taken, and all of them passed through the second layer. I took a look, and then I realized that you actually used a special clone to brush the test and take away treasures. "

"Your special clone is very powerful, and even the soul will and breath have changed, but even if I can't see it, I can guess how there can be so many demonic third realms in a short period of time, and I can't deduce you, this is not normal. "

"Don't deny it, even if you don't admit it, I still won't let you in again, leave now, otherwise your doppelganger will fall here!"

The multi-dimensional intelligent being threatened.

Ye Tian immediately retreated.

Soon, he came out of here.

"It's a pity!"

He originally wanted to get more treasures, but he didn't expect that the multi-dimensional intelligent life left by the Wumu Realm Lord found out about him and didn't let him in.

He didn't dare to resist, the strength of the other party was absolutely terrifying, and the ontological combat power was definitely the existence of the fifth realm.

Even if this kind of existence can't deduce his traces, if you use some special methods, you may be able to trace his traces from the side and find the human race.

When the time comes, the Terrans will be in trouble.

Therefore, he did not dare to offend the other party.

"Having gained some benefits, it's enough, can't be greedy anymore!"

Ye Tian dismantled this copy body.

Next, he worked hard to improve his cultivation, comprehend the rules of the super-dimensional, cultivate the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, the body of the black mother, cultivate the secret method of the three blacks, and at the same time, he was also cultivating the Rock Will Method.

And the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sand and Gravel Robbery, he is also trying to improve it, trying to create the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect, but the time it takes will definitely be very long, and it will not be able to do it in a short period of time.

The 600 extradimensional era has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's Ka Ye Wisdom Body is about to usher in a breakthrough, and he has already broken through the Ka Ye Wisdom Body to the second layer realm, and these years are also focusing on improving the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, trying to cultivate it to the second level of Xiaocheng Realm.

To this end, he cultivated a large number of Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, most of which were used to improve the wisdom of the Kasya.

Once the Ka Ye wisdom body breaks through to the second layer, his strength will increase a bit, and the multi-dimensional wisdom light will be even more powerful, and the efficiency of assisting in cultivating and comprehending the extradimensional rules will naturally skyrocket.

In order to be able to break through the bottleneck, he prepared multiple drops of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, and then swallowed it in one bite to impact the bottleneck.

Rumble!!!!!

The energy release of these multi-dimensional treasure essences is 307 releases, constantly hitting the bottleneck.

Gradually, his neck cracked.

Click!

The bottleneck was completely broken, Ye Tian's Jiaye wisdom body broke through to the second layer of Xiaocheng realm, his physical body was improved by a section, his own recovery ability skyrocketed, and the effect of multi-dimensional wisdom light naturally skyrocketed.

Seeing that the wisdom body of Jiaye had broken through, Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

In addition, during this period of time, the extra-dimensional realms of the human race were also born one after another, with a wider and wider range of influence, and more and more extra-dimensional territories occupied.

At this time, the batch of half-step superdimensional realms that chose to fuse the superdimensional bloodline at the beginning were undoubtedly regretted.

Of course, with Ye Tian's current strength, restoring their foundation and giving them the hope of breaking through the transcendent realm can also be done, but it will have to pay a lot of price.

He won't help them unless there's a great merit to the Terrans.

And with the birth of a large number of the second realm of the Terran Race, many forces in the Six Thousand Territory were shocked, and they did not dare to offend Ye Tian, but they also reported the information of the Terran Race to those overlord-level superdimensional forces in the Five Thousand Territory.

For example, Blazing Sun Palace.

They were originally not interested in the Terrans, after all, the Terrans were too weak for them, and according to the news reported by the forces below, the Terrans most likely had a multidimensional treasure bottle, which made them interested.
